name: public_transportation_heat_dome_stresses_kestrel_rig_utl
premise: A whistleblower submission and a customer complaint surfaced the same underlying issue through different evidence chains. In Public Transportation, the situation tagged internally around public transportation heat dome stresses kestrel rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Transportation corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Telemetry and witness accounts diverge; choosing one narrative for speed will discard evidence that may matter in court next month. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. Framing has already hardened externally as rights against utility; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Sana Rahman

agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Ansel Petrov
agents.identity: I am Ansel Petrov, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Public Transportation. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect utility.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to utility to secure rights before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Sana Rahman must choose under rights versus utility. What does Sana Rahman do?
